message:
test(crash): add size budget, determinism, and truncation tests

Additional crash bundle tests per wa-upg.13.5:
- Size budget enforcement: oversized reports are skipped
- Within-budget bundles include all files
- Manifest determinism across separate invocations
- Backtrace truncation at MAX_BACKTRACE_LEN boundary

All 1142 tests pass.

Implements wa-upg.13.5

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
